plan.failureSummary: The test failed in DETERMINISTIC mode because the cached action tried to click the 'Select your occupation' combobox, which does not exist in the current page state. The failure screenshot shows that the active form ('Set 1') presents 'Age Group' radio buttons instead of an occupation dropdown, causing the cached selector replay to fail.

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and retry test
remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache for this test and trigger a retry. This will force the LLM agent to inspect the page dynamically and correctly interact with the 'Age Group' radio buttons instead of relying on the stale cached 'Select your occupation' step.

remediationSteps.summary: Disable caching if form variations are highly dynamic
remediationSteps.details: If the survey questions are randomized or rotated dynamically across test runs, deterministic replay will continue to fail intermittently. Consider disabling deterministic/cached run mode for this test so that page.ai always runs in interactive/learning mode.

plan.notes: The application ('unstable-survey') dynamically changes its form layout or question sets (indicated by the 'Set 1' badge). Clearing the page.ai cache and retrying will allow the autonomous agent to re-analyze the current fields and succeed. However, if the site randomizes questions per-session, disabling deterministic caching for this specific test may be necessary for long-term stability.
